build.buildCommand: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=384' npm install --prefer-offline && npm run build && npm prune --omit=dev

deploy.startCommand: DATABASE_URL=$(node -e 'const u=new URL(process.env.DATABASE_URL);u.searchParams.set("schema","mockbank");console.log(u.toString())') npx prisma migrate deploy && node dist/src/main.js
